Library.Command:
SET ANSI_NULLS ON GO SET QUOTED_IDENTIFIER ON GO
-- ============================================= -- Author: Daniel Šašek -- Create date: 2029-03-02 -- Description: -- ============================================= #MODIFIER# PROCEDURE #NAME# ( @UserLanguageID INT, @FolderTreeIdent VARCHAR(900), @UserText NVARCHAR(4000) = NULL, @Top INT = 5,
@IncludeCatalogOnly BIT = 1, @PreferCatalog BIT = 0,
@MinFtsRank INT = 10, @DeletedState INT = 0, @UICultureCode NVARCHAR(20) = N'cs-CZ' ) AS BEGIN SET NOCOUNT ON;
------------------------------------------------------------------- -- 1) Fulltext query ------------------------------------------------------------------- DECLARE @FtQuery NVARCHAR(4000) = usr.ITSM_KnowledgeBaseBuildFullTextQuery(@UserText); DECLARE @UseFts BIT = CASE WHEN @FtQuery IS NULL THEN 0 ELSE 1 END;
------------------------------------------------------------------- -- 2) Dataset ------------------------------------------------------------------- ;WITH fts AS ( SELECT KEY_TBL.[KEY] AS knowledgeBaseTextID, KEY_TBL.RANK AS ftsRank FROM CONTAINSTABLE(usr.ITSMKnowledgeBase, (Title, Content), @FtQuery) AS KEY_TBL ), base AS ( SELECT -- základní identifikátory itsKnbSetting.ID AS knowledgeBaseSettingID, itsKnbSetting.Guid AS knowledgeBaseGuid, -- GUID článku (stejný jako itsKnb.Guid) itsKnb.ID AS knowledgeBaseTextID, -- jazyková řádka itsKnb.Guid AS knowledgeBaseTextGuid, -- pro debug
-- UI / obsah itsKnb.Title AS kbTitle, itsKnb.Content, itsKnb.LanguageID, itsKnb.CreateDate, itsKnb.LastUpdate, itsKnb.AccountID,
-- typ / vizuál itsKbt.TextValue AS typeText, itsKbtSetting.FunctionalKey AS typeFunctionalKey, ISNULL(itsKbtSetting.IconCssClass, 'ph-file') AS iconCssClass, ISNULL(itsKbtSetting.ColorCssClass, 'primary') AS colorCssClass,
-- katalog match (koncová položka) hasFolderMatch = CASE WHEN itsKbcfsf.TableID IS NULL THEN 0 ELSE 1 END,
-- scoring složky folderBoost = CASE WHEN itsKbcfsf.TableID IS NULL THEN 0 ELSE 500 END,
typeBoost = CASE WHEN itsKbtSetting.FunctionalKey = 'KnownError' THEN 200 ELSE 0 END,
preferCatalogBoost = CASE WHEN @PreferCatalog = 1 AND itsKbcfsf.TableID IS NOT NULL THEN 150 ELSE 0 END
FROM dbo.FolderTree AS fot INNER JOIN usr.ITSMKnowledgeBaseCommonFolderSubForm AS itsKbcfsf ON itsKbcfsf.CommonFolderTreeIdent = fot.Ident AND itsKbcfsf.[State] <> @DeletedState AND itsKbcfsf.FormIdent = 'ITSMKnowledgeBaseSetting'
INNER JOIN usr.ITSMKnowledgeBaseSetting AS itsKnbSetting ON itsKnbSetting.ID = itsKbcfsf.TableID AND itsKnbSetting.[State] <> @DeletedState
INNER JOIN usr.ITSMKnowledgeBase AS itsKnb ON itsKnb.Guid = itsKnbSetting.Guid AND itsKnb.LanguageID = @UserLanguageID AND itsKnb.[State] <> @DeletedState
LEFT JOIN usr.ITSMKnowledgeBaseTypeSetting AS itsKbtSetting ON itsKbtSetting.Guid = itsKnbSetting.ITSMKnowledgeBaseTypeGuid AND itsKbtSetting.[State] <> @DeletedState
LEFT JOIN usr.ITSMKnowledgeBaseType AS itsKbt ON itsKbt.Guid = itsKbtSetting.Guid AND itsKbt.LanguageID = @UserLanguageID AND itsKbt.[State] <> @DeletedState
WHERE fot.Ident = @FolderTreeIdent AND 1 = 0 ), scored AS ( SELECT base.*,
-- FTS ftsRank = CASE WHEN @UseFts = 1 THEN ISNULL(fts.ftsRank, 0) ELSE 0 END,
isFtsMatch = CASE WHEN @UseFts = 1 AND fts.knowledgeBaseTextID IS NOT NULL THEN 1 ELSE 0 END,
isCatalogMatch = base.hasFolderMatch,
-- UI group resultGroup = CASE WHEN @UseFts = 1 AND fts.knowledgeBaseTextID IS NOT NULL AND ISNULL(fts.ftsRank,0) >= @MinFtsRank THEN 1 WHEN base.hasFolderMatch = 1 THEN 2 ELSE 9 END,
-- celkové score score = base.folderBoost + base.typeBoost + base.preferCatalogBoost + (CASE WHEN @UseFts = 1 THEN ISNULL(fts.ftsRank, 0) ELSE 0 END)
FROM base LEFT JOIN fts ON fts.knowledgeBaseTextID = base.knowledgeBaseTextID ) SELECT TOP (@Top) ------------------------------------------------------------------- -- UI sloupce: stejné jako tvůj SELECT (jen pojmenování sjednocené) ------------------------------------------------------------------- ID = scored.knowledgeBaseSettingID, Title = CONCAT(scored.typeText + ' - ', scored.kbTitle), CreateDate = FORMAT(scored.CreateDate, 'dd.MM.yyyy', @UICultureCode), AccountID = creatorAcc.FullName, IconCssClass = scored.iconCssClass, ColorCssClass = scored.colorCssClass, FolderTreeIdent = @FolderTreeIdent,
------------------------------------------------------------------- -- Debug sloupce navíc (původní + nové) ------------------------------------------------------------------- ResultGroup = scored.resultGroup, -- 1=FTS, 2=Catalog Score = scored.score, FtsRank = scored.ftsRank, UseFts = @UseFts,
IsFtsMatch = scored.isFtsMatch, IsCatalogMatch = scored.isCatalogMatch,
TypeText = scored.typeText, TypeFunctionalKey = scored.typeFunctionalKey,
HasFolderMatch = scored.hasFolderMatch, FolderBoost = scored.folderBoost, TypeBoost = scored.typeBoost, PreferCatalogBoost = scored.preferCatalogBoost,
KnowledgeBaseGuid = scored.knowledgeBaseGuid, KnowledgeBaseTextID = scored.knowledgeBaseTextID, KnowledgeBaseTextGuid = scored.knowledgeBaseTextGuid,
LanguageID = scored.LanguageID, LastUpdate = scored.LastUpdate,
FtQuery = @FtQuery, UserText = @UserText
FROM scored LEFT JOIN dbo.Account AS creatorAcc ON creatorAcc.ID = scored.AccountID WHERE ( -- FTS výsledky nad prahem (scored.resultGroup = 1)
-- katalogové výsledky jen pokud povoleno OR (scored.resultGroup = 2 AND @IncludeCatalogOnly = 1) ) ORDER BY -- 1) sekce scored.resultGroup ASC,
-- 2) KnownError dopředu v rámci sekce CASE WHEN scored.typeFunctionalKey = 'KnownError' THEN 0 ELSE 1 END,
-- 3) relevance scored.score DESC,
-- 4) fallback: novější scored.CreateDate DESC; END
